issue_summary: org.apache.commons.compress.compressors.gzip.GzipParameters.setOperatingSystem(int) now throws CompressorException on illegal input
javadoc_before:
/**
         * Gets the {@link OS} matching the given code.
         *
         * @param code an OS or {@link #UNKNOWN} for no match.
         * @return a {@link OS}.
         */
javadoc_after:
/**
         * Gets the {@link OS} matching the given code.
         *
         * @param code an OS or {@link #UNKNOWN} for no match.
         * @return a {@link OS}.
         * @throws CompressException Thrown when the {@code code} is undefined, as opposed to {@code UNKNOWN}.
         */
